name: Image
description: Displays an image with preview and tranformation options. For multiple image, see Galleria.

props.name: imageStyle
props.description: Inline style of the image element.

props.name: imageClass
props.description: Style class of the image element.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: show
events.description: Triggered when the preview overlay is shown.

events.name: hide
events.description: Triggered when the preview overlay is hidden.

events.name: error
events.description: Triggered when an error occurs while loading an image file.

slots.name: image
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the image element. */ class: any; /** * Style of the image element. */ style: any; /** * Preview click function. */ errorCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: preview
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the preview image element. */ class: any; /** * Style of the preview image element. */ style: any; /** * Preview click function. */ previewCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]

slots.name: original
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the original image element. */ class: any; /** * Style of the original image element. */ style: any; /** * Preview click function. */ previewCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
